trigger_keywords: aumenta el rendimiento sin diluir calidad

steps.label: cause
steps.text: Vines in a dry region need supplemental water delivered efficiently.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: Drip lines release measured amounts of water slowly and directly into the root zone of each vine.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: Water use can be controlled precisely with less evaporation and runoff than broad surface application.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: Water use can be controlled precisely with less evaporation and runoff than broad surface application.
